title: acetosella distans
intro: Acetosella distans is a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae, commonly known as the wood sorrel or wood-sorrel. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of oxalic acid and tannins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Acetosella distans include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat conditions such as urinary tract infections and skin irritations.
